race.description: Vale Trent Potts Country Boosted (C1) Handicap
race.comment: CITY OF TEARS (3) resumes after creating a big impression on debut from the wide gate with a dominant victory over 1006m at Port Macquarie last October. Tipped straight out and looks to have the upside to remain unbeaten. SEND A TELEGRAM (2) pushed forward from a wide draw and the early effort took its toll late with a fading sixth over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Back in trip and finds a much easier race. ALL TORN UP (4) got the job done on debut with a slick win over 1007m at Taree. Gets a similar set up and should handle the rise in class. That trio look to hold the key hopes.
